items.title: Jungle Grid proof of value for sample/mcp-worker
items.content: Implementation plan for sample/mcp-worker: use the evidenced workflow MCP Worker lets agent clients launch observable batch inference tasks [ev_f9bc22aa682a5a6d] as the baseline, integrate Jungle Grid behind one adapter, run a pilot, and compare reliability and delivery time. Sources: [ev_f9bc22aa682a5a6d] [ev_7bda7531b3582100] [ev_af2ca0818bcf50aa] [ev_85f278e91fb8f02d] [ev_ccd04ee46bc73b97] [ev_9949262a08e3bacb] [ev_be9b87c519d02a3a]
